summary: Frontend testing completed for Reports page improvements and Settings page simplification. All requested features verified working correctly via UI testing with Playwright.

integration_issues.issue: Pre-existing issue: Browser session sometimes shows 'User SALES STAFF' instead of 'Admin User' on page navigation/reload. This is not related to the tested features.

date_range_badge.details: Date range badge visible with prominent green background (rgb(216, 243, 220) = #D8F3DC). Shows dynamic dates like 'Mar 1 - Mar 2, 2026' with calendar icon.

period_filters.details: All period filters visible and interactive: Today, Week, Month (default active), Quarter, Year, Custom

tab_navigation.details: All tabs visible: Overview, Products, Staff, Customers, Payments. Tabs switch and show different content.

export_button_dynamic.details: Export button text changes based on active tab. Confirmed: 'Export Overview', 'Export Customers', 'Export Payments'

tab_specific_content.overview_tab: Shows KPIs (Total Revenue, Orders, Avg Order Value, New Customers), Revenue Trend chart, Payment Methods pie chart, Top Products
tab_specific_content.products_tab: Shows Items Sold, Active Categories, Top Performers KPIs, Top Selling Products list, Category Performance
tab_specific_content.staff_tab: Shows Active Staff, Total Orders, Total Revenue, Avg per Staff KPIs, Staff Leaderboard
tab_specific_content.customers_tab: Shows New Customers, Total Orders, Avg Order Value, Orders/Customer KPIs, Customer Insights, Customer Growth
tab_specific_content.payments_tab: Shows Total Payments, Transactions, Avg Transaction, Cash Ratio KPIs, Payment Distribution chart, Payment Details

simple_view_default.details: Simple view shows by default with 'Essential Settings' section containing visual cards: Business Profile, Currency & Tax, Staff & Access

setup_wizard.details: Setup wizard modal appears for first-time users with 'Welcome to Soko!' message, progress dots (4 steps), Let's Go button

wizard_steps.details: Wizard has multiple steps: Welcome, Business Information, Currency Settings, Final confirmation. Each step has Back, Skip, Set Up Now buttons.

advanced_toggle_button.details: 'Advanced' button visible in top right corner, switches to full tabbed view showing: General, RetailPro, Apps, POS, Locations, Plan, Referral tabs

simple_toggle_button.details: 'Simple' button visible in advanced view (top right), switches back to card-based layout with Essential Settings

advanced_settings_accordion.details: 'Advanced Settings' collapsible section visible below Essential Settings cards. Contains options like SKU & Barcodes, Locations, Offline Mode, Referral Program, Connected Apps, Subscription

setup_progress.details: 'Complete Your Setup' progress card shows 0/3 completion with progress bar and 'Continue Setup' button

critical_code_review_comments: Reports page implementation is complete with proper tab-specific content rendering (renderOverviewTab, renderProductsTab, renderStaffTab, renderCustomersTab, renderPaymentsTab)
Date range badge correctly uses THEME.primarySoft (#D8F3DC) for green background
getDisplayDateRange() correctly calculates dynamic date ranges for each period
Export button text dynamically changes based on activeTab state
SimpleSettingsView component properly implements wizard modal, card-based layout, and progressive disclosure
Settings page viewMode state correctly toggles between 'simple' and 'advanced' views
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page and Settings page features are fully implemented. The Reports page has 5 tabs (Overview, Products, Staff, Customers, Payments) each with unique content and KPIs. The Settings page has two view modes: Simple (card-based with wizard) and Advanced (full tabbed interface). The setup wizard appears for first-time users when business name is not set.
